narrative:
Fremont City 4-B (precinct in Sandusky County) has 772 registered voters, with 67.1% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 15.7% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 17.2%, a narrow Democratic lean of 1.6 percentage points.
